heading: Acceptance of promotions; oath of office
label: 626 Acceptance of promotions; oath of office

children.label: a
children.text: An officer who is appointed to a higher grade under is considered to have accepted such appointment on the date on which the appointment is made unless he expressly declines the appointment.section 624 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: An officer who has served continuously since he subscribed to the oath of office prescribed in is not required to take a new oath upon appointment to a higher grade under .section 3331 of title 5section 624 of this title
